no_launch_boundary: No RunPod, Modal, GPU acquisition, full training launch, push, or protected-branch auth request is authorized by this spec.

clean_action.description: Match clean student and teacher command histories on the declared target/observation bank.

perturbation_response.description: Match teacher-induced corrective command response under the calibrated perturbation bank.

input_output_jvp.implementation: jax.linearize plus jax.vmap over banked directional probes; no dense Jacobian materialization in the training path
input_output_jvp.description: Match local action-history map derivatives with respect to externally meaningful feedback and action histories.

student_forced_rollout_anchor.description: Anchor student-forced rollout summaries to base-row/teacher clean behavior without selecting on hidden coordinates.

local_acceptance_checks: JVP loss matches dense-Jacobian behavior on tiny toy maps
JVP loss is batchable and jittable with vectorized direction probes
C&S h0 distillation config surface can compose clean action, perturbation-response, JVP, and rollout-anchor components on small shapes
